subject: The biggest AI event ever
body:
I am so excited to finally announce this.

AfricAI - the #1 AI mastermind on the planet. Cape Town, South Africa.

February 2-7

This has never been done before. It may never be done again.

Every single industry leader in AI automation and AI-for-business under one roof. The full lineup is insane.

VIP ticket holders get 3 full days of access to me and all the speakers. Safari, yacht day, private dinners, parties and real conversations with the people shaping this industry.

I am going to be blunt: if you are serious about scaling your AI business this year, this is one of the best investments you can make.

VIP tickets are almost sold out. GA spots are limited. You need to apply.

I would love to meet you there.

Liam
